close_reason: Deleted 4 obsolete test files testing storage team-based reads: layout_index_test.exs, point_reads_test.exs, range_reads_test.exs, range_reads_selector_test.exs. Implementation files kept (they raise on use - correct behavior until materializer integration).
description:
Storage teams have been retired. Several test files were skipped during the removal:

- test/bedrock/internal/transaction_builder/transaction_builder/layout_index_test.exs
- test/bedrock/internal/transaction_builder/transaction_builder/point_reads_test.exs
- test/bedrock/internal/transaction_builder/transaction_builder/range_reads_test.exs
- test/bedrock/internal/transaction_builder/transaction_builder/range_reads_selector_test.exs

These tests tested direct storage reads via LayoutIndex which is no longer supported. Options:
1. Delete the tests entirely if the functionality is obsolete
2. Rewrite tests for materializer-based reads once that's implemented
3. Keep LayoutIndex tests but update assertions to expect empty segments
title: Review/remove skipped storage team tests
